ddls:
CREATE TABLE "certificates" (
  "certificate_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each certificate */,
  "certificate_name" TEXT /* Name of the certificate */,
  "certificate_type" TEXT /* Type of certificate (e.g., SSL/TLS, client, root) */,
  "certificate_body" TEXT /* Body of the certificate */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the certificate was created */,
  "expires_at" TEXT /* Date the certificate expires */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the certificate is active */,
  "issuer" TEXT /* The entity that issued the certificate */,
  "subject" TEXT /* The entity to which the certificate is issued */,
  "serial_number" TEXT /* A unique serial number for the certificate */,
  "fingerprint" TEXT /* A hash of the certificate for easy identification */,
  "private_key_id" INTEGER /* ID of the private key associated with the certificate */,
  "cloud_provider" TEXT /* The cloud provider where the certificate is deployed */,
  "deployment_status" TEXT /* The status of the certificate deployment */,
  "renewal_date" TEXT /* The date when the certificate was last renewed */,
  "revoked_at" TEXT /* The date when the certificate was revoked */,
  "revocation_reason" TEXT /* The reason for revocation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("certificate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_certificates_cloud_provider FOREIGN KEY ("cloud_provider") REFERENCES cloud_providers ("provider_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_certificates_private_key_id FOREIGN KEY ("private_key_id") REFERENCES private_keys ("private_key_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "certificate_chains" (
  "chain_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each certificate chain */,
  "certificate_id" INTEGER /* ID of the certificate the chain belongs to */,
  "chain_body" TEXT /* Body of the certificate chain */,
  "intermediate_certificate_id" INTEGER /* ID of the intermediate certificate in the chain */,
  "chain_fingerprint" TEXT /* A hash of the entire certificate chain for easy identification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("chain_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_certificate_chains_certificate_id FOREIGN KEY ("certificate_id") REFERENCES certificates ("certificate_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, user) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user account */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role FOREIGN KEY ("role") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "certificate_requests" (
  "request_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each CSR */,
  "certificate_id" INTEGER /* ID of the certificate the CSR belongs to */,
  "csr_body" TEXT /* Body of the CSR */,
  "request_date" TEXT /* Date the CSR was requested */,
  "approval_status" TEXT /* Status of the CSR approval */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who requested the CSR */,
  "cloud_provider" TEXT /* The cloud provider where the CSR is intended for */,
  "request_reason" TEXT /* The reason for the CSR */,
  "approved_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who approved the CSR */,
  "approved_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the CSR was approved */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("request_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_certificate_requests_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_certificate_requests_approved_by FOREIGN KEY ("approved_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_certificate_requests_cloud_provider FOREIGN KEY ("cloud_provider") REFERENCES cloud_providers ("provider_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_certificate_requests_certificate_id FOREIGN KEY ("certificate_id") REFERENCES certificates ("certificate_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "private_keys" (
  "private_key_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each private key */,
  "private_key_body" TEXT /* Body of the private key */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the private key was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the private key was last updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the private key (e.g., active, revoked) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("private_key_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "certificate_id" INTEGER /* ID of the certificate related to the notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who received the notification */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of the event (e.g., expiration, renewal, revocation) */,
  "event_date" TEXT /* Date and time of the event */,
  "message" TEXT /* Message of the notification */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the notification (e.g., pending, sent, failed) */,
  "sent_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the notification was sent */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_certificate_id FOREIGN KEY ("certificate_id") REFERENCES certificates ("certificate_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cloud_providers" (
  "provider_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cloud provider */,
  "provider_name" TEXT /* Name of the cloud provider */,
  "api_key" TEXT /* API key for the cloud provider */,
  "api_secret" TEXT /* API secret for the cloud provider */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the cloud provider was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the cloud provider details were last updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the cloud provider (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("provider_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the role was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the role was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)
